subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down, the clear evidences made manifest, and the sealed wine hath been unsealed by the finger of God, the Almighty, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت البینات و فک الرحیق المختوم باصبع الله المقتدر المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Word of God and human limitations
